heading: Disable Regionalized Private Endpoints
body:
To disable the regionalized private endpoint setting for your project using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas privateEndpoints regionalModes disable [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas privateEndpoints regionalModes disable](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-privateEndpoints-regionalModes-disable).
